## Notes for vCISO Completing This Template

**Before Sending:**
- [ ] Remove all bracketed instructions
- [ ] Replace all placeholder values with actual data
- [ ] Update all metrics from platform dashboards
- [ ] Verify all dates and milestones
- [ ] Check for typos and formatting
- [ ] Ensure all charts/graphs are current
- [ ] Confirm all recommendations are actionable
- [ ] Review with internal team before distribution
- [ ] Export to PDF for professional delivery
- [ ] Log completion in project management system

**Quality Checklist:**
- [ ] Data is accurate and up-to-date
- [ ] Trends are correctly calculated
- [ ] Recommendations are clear and actionable
- [ ] Executive summary highlights key items
- [ ] No technical jargon without explanation
- [ ] Visual elements enhance understanding
- [ ] Document is professional and polished
